chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 04 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.157/2026 (U/A) 2. For hearing of MA No.99/2026 (R/Surety) 11.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Shakeel Lakho, Advocate for applicant / surety. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. This application is filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it seems that accused Asadullah Solangi, who on 13.01.2026, was granted protective bail for a period of seven days, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/-, for which applicant stood surety by depositing original defence savings certificate of such amount, had surrendered before the trial Court and has obtained interim pre-arrest bail, as is evident from certificate dated 19.01.2026 of the trial Court, annexed with this application. Learned Assistant Attorney General, present, does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
